doNotOverstate: Do not import BWV unless the papers support it.
Do not import custody safeguards unless the papers support it.
Do not import drugs continuity unless the papers support it.
Do not import ABE unless the papers support it.
Do not import phone extraction/metadata unless the papers support it.
Do not state "final medical report" — Medical material is absent, draft, or outstanding
Do not state "medical report proves" — Medical material is absent, draft, or outstanding
Do not state "medical is consistent" — Medical material is absent, draft, or outstanding

Do not import co-defendant material (MG6C/CO — co-defendant-only — co-defendant segregation map (Irid / folio 281) — not this defendant — outstanding — not on bundle.) to this defendant's case theory.

Do not import co-defendant material (Co-defendant-only — Outstanding: medical report — Cullen Irid; imaging — Cullen Irid; co-defendant segregation map (Irid / folio 281). — not this defendant) to this defendant's case theory.
Do not import co-defendant material (Co-defendant-only — co-defendant segregation map (Irid / folio 281) — not this defendant) to this defendant's case theory.
hardRules: Referred only does not mean usable.
Inference must be labelled as inference.
No line is sendable just because a source exists.

chaseItems.label: MG6 / unused schedule clarification
chaseItems.copySuggestion:
Please provide mG6 / unused schedule clarification or confirm in writing why it is not available.

[CaseBrain — CPS chase copy. Evidence state: missing. Source: CPS / disclosure officer. Solicitor review required before sending.]

chaseItems.label: Medical / expert source report
chaseItems.copySuggestion:
Please provide medical / expert source report or confirm in writing why it is not available.

[CaseBrain — CPS chase copy. Evidence state: missing. Source: CPS / expert source (confirm on file). Solicitor review required before sending.]

courtNote.text:
The defence asks the court to record outstanding medical, video and sequence material.

[CaseBrain — court line copy. Evidence state: needs review. Confirm before addressing the court.]

exportVersion.reviewFooter: Solicitor review required before sending to CPS, court, or client.
